title: taraxacum quadrangulum
intro: Taraxacum quadrangulum, also known as the four-angled dandelion or four-angled hawk's beard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus Taraxacum. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily used to treat digestive issues and skin conditions due to its high content of inulin, a prebiotic fiber that promotes gut health. The health benefits of Taraxacum quadrangulum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and support the treatment of various gastrointestinal disorders. Taraxacum quadrangulum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, tinctures, and dried roots, which can be used to make teas, capsules, or added to food products.
